commitMessage:
Anchor clamped windows to the snap edge instead of leaving a gap (#1778)

* Add ClampedWindowAligner pure placement helper with tests

* Route FixedSizeWindowMover through ClampedWindowAligner (fix half-snap edge anchoring)

* Add EdgeAlignmentWindowMover to standard chain (fix FaceTime gap on half snaps)

* Document moveFixedSizeToEdge flag
